summary: Strategy Leaderboard feature testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend leaderboard page works correctly with demo mode showing 8 mock strategies, sortable table, top-3 podium, and strategy detail modal with equity curve. One minor bug found: max_drawdown sort order parameter is inverted in backend.

minor.issue: max_drawdown sort order parameter is inverted - order=asc returns descending, order=desc returns ascending

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies?demo=true returns 8 mock strategies sorted by Sharpe
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies?demo=true&sort_by=total_return&order=desc returns strategies sorted by total return
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies?demo=true&sort_by=win_rate returns strategies sorted by win rate
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies?demo=true&sort_by=max_drawdown works (order param inverted)
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies (no demo) returns real strategies from DB with data_source=coingecko
Backend POST /api/leaderboard/strategies creates/updates a leaderboard entry
Backend POST /api/leaderboard/strategies auto-generates ID when not provided
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies/{id}?demo=true returns single strategy detail with equity_curve
Backend GET /api/leaderboard/strategies/{invalid_id}?demo=true returns success=false
Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest auto-pushes results to leaderboard (non-demo)
Backend demo strategies have all required fields and metrics
Backend demo strategy types are valid (momentum, mean_reversion, breakout)
Leaderboard page (/leaderboard?demo=true): Title 'Strategy Leaderboard' visible
Leaderboard page: 'Demo Mode — Mock Data' badge visible in demo mode
Leaderboard page: Top-3 podium cards showing 1st, 2nd, 3rd place strategies
Leaderboard page: Table shows 8 strategy rows with Sharpe, Return, MaxDD, WinRate, Trades columns
Leaderboard page: Click column headers to sort (Sharpe, Return, MaxDD, WinRate)
Leaderboard page: Sort by Return shows BTC Momentum Alpha first (24.8%)
Leaderboard page: Sort by Win Rate shows ETH Scalper Pro first (71.2%)
Leaderboard page: Click 'View' button opens strategy detail modal
Leaderboard page: Detail modal shows data source badge 'Demo Mode — Mock Data'
Leaderboard page: Detail modal shows metrics grid (Sharpe, Return, MaxDD, WinRate)
Leaderboard page: Detail modal shows equity curve chart with 30 bars
Leaderboard page: Detail modal shows Total Trades, Profit Factor stats
Leaderboard page: Close detail modal by clicking outside
Leaderboard page: Refresh button works
Simulation page: Toast shows 'Strategy added to Leaderboard' in non-demo mode (code verified)
Strategy Lab page: Toast shows 'Strategy added to Leaderboard' (code verified)
No regressions on Research page
No regressions on AI Agents page
No regressions on Marketplace page
action_items: MINOR: Fix max_drawdown sort order logic in /app/backend/routes/leaderboard.py line 246-247 - the order parameter is inverted for max_drawdown sorting
critical_code_review_comments: leaderboard.py: DEMO_STRATEGIES constant has 8 well-structured mock strategies with all required fields
leaderboard.py: GET /api/leaderboard/strategies correctly handles demo vs real mode
leaderboard.py: POST /api/leaderboard/strategies correctly upserts to strategy_leaderboard collection
strategies.py: Backtest auto-push to leaderboard implemented correctly (line 399-411)
simulation.py: Simulation backtest auto-push to leaderboard implemented correctly (line 689-704)
LeaderboardPage.jsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
LeaderboardPage.jsx: Podium, sortable table, and detail modal all work correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used DEMO_STRATEGIES constant for demo mode and created test strategies via POST endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strategy Leaderboard feature fully tested. Demo mode uses 8 static mock strategies (DEMO_STRATEGIES constant). Real mode queries strategy_leaderboard MongoDB collection. Auto-push to leaderboard works from both Strategy Lab backtest and Simulation backtest endpoints. Minor bug: max_drawdown sort order is inverted (order=asc returns desc, order=desc returns asc). Event Agents page (/event-agents) returns 404 - pre-existing issue not related to leaderboard feature.

mocked_apis_list: Demo Mode: 8 static mock strategies in DEMO_STRATEGIES constant
Real mode: CoinGecko OHLC data via backtest engine

features_tested.leaderboard_demo_mode_default_sort: PASS - Returns 8 strategies sorted by Sharpe desc
features_tested.leaderboard_demo_mode_sort_drawdown: PASS - Works but order param inverted (minor bug)
features_tested.leaderboard_single_strategy_detail: PASS - Returns full detail with equity_curve
features_tested.simulation_backtest_auto_push: PASS - Pushes to leaderboard in non-demo mode
features_tested.frontend_demo_badge: PASS - 'Demo Mode — Mock Data' badge visible
features_tested.frontend_detail_modal: PASS - Opens with equity curve and metrics
features_tested.toast_messages: PASS - Code verified for 'Strategy added to Leaderboard' toast
features_tested.no_regressions: PASS - Research, AI Agents, Marketplace pages load correctly
